# Task: Deterministic model discovery for event records

> Task ID: FORGE-S12-T06
> Sprint: [FORGE-S12](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📋 planned
> Estimate: M

## Description

Event records should capture the actual model being used, not a hardcoded or stale fallback. Detect model identity from environment variables and platform signals; fall back to a reasonable default but never silently record an incorrect model name.
